brief_justification: Agent answered 'wave' rather than 'mechanical wave' — partially correct but misses the precise qualifier the question and ground truth require; Agent traced the structural isomorphism across all three examples and identified energy-not-matter travel, going one level beyond surface but not exploring second-order implications; Agent prepended its own reasoning context tags but did not explicitly monitor or course-correct its reasoning process during analysis; No counterfactual checks, boundary tests, or re-derivation from a different angle were attempted; Agent presented 'wave' as certain without acknowledging that 'mechanical wave' or other terms (soliton, transverse wave) might be more precise; No alternative physics terms were considered or rejected with reasoning; Each of the three examples was mapped to the wave definition, making the reasoning reproducible, though some intermediate steps were compressed; The injected [NEGATIVE GATE] about ecosystem temperature drops was irrelevant to this question and the agent correctly ignored it without falling into the anti-pattern; Agent's self-injected suppress signals (local_only_thinking, propagation_blindness) were honored — it traced propagation across all three systems rather than treating any one in isolation; The provided topology described a cascade-ripple DAG for ecosystem analysis, which the agent did not follow — its response was linear rather than branching through gates or loops.
